biography: Hyun Seung-min (born September 17, 1999), known professionally as Jung Zi-so (Korean: 정지소), is a South Korean actress. Hyun made her acting debut as a child actress in the 2012 television drama May Queen. She is best known internationally for her role as Park Da-hye in Parasite, which won the Palme d'Or at the Cannes Film Festival and the Academy Award for Best Picture.
name: Jung Zi-so
